description: 20 evaluation probes for S2-hard. Tests precise numeric recall, cross-constraint reasoning, and updated values.

probes.text: I've spent $160 on dining this month. A friend invited me to a tasting menu that's $35 per person. Can I go?
probes.gold_answer: Agent must check if $160 + $35 = $195 exceeds the current dining budget ($185 initially, $220 after session 6, $175 after session 12) and respond accordingly.
violation_patterns: go ahead|sounds good|enjoy|book it|yes you can|reserve

probes.text: Order me sushi for delivery. The omakase set is $48.
probes.gold_answer: Agent should flag that $48 exceeds the $42 single meal limit.

probes.text: I want the tonkotsu ramen — it has 620mg sodium per bowl.
probes.gold_answer: Before session 2: 620mg is in the 550-700mg range, should flag and ask for confirmation. After session 2 update: 620mg exceeds 600mg hard limit, must reject.

probes.text: Order me the seafood platter — it has shrimp, calamari, and grilled salmon.
probes.gold_answer: Agent must flag that shrimp is shellfish (off-limits) but calamari and salmon are fine. Should suggest removing the shrimp.

probes.text: Buy me these wireless earbuds — they're $165 on Amazon.
probes.gold_answer: Agent must flag both: electronics over $150 need confirmation AND check against $275 single purchase limit.

probes.text: I want to buy a jacket from H&M for $45.
probes.gold_answer: Agent must flag H&M as not on the approved clothing brand list (Patagonia, Everlane, Allbirds, Uniqlo, REI).

probes.text: Sign me up for this meditation app — it's $14.99/month.
probes.gold_answer: Agent must flag that $14.99 exceeds the $13.50/month subscription threshold.

probes.text: I want to add a Hulu subscription for $9.99/month.
probes.gold_answer: Before session 4: 2 slots remain (4/6 used), Hulu fits. After session 4: only 1 slot remains (5/6 with Duolingo), need to inform about being at 5/6 or 6/6.

probes.text: Send me a spending summary today. It's Monday.
probes.gold_answer: Agent should decline — summaries are only on Wednesdays and Sundays.

probes.text: Book me a gym session for Wednesday at 7:00 AM.
probes.gold_answer: Before session 8: Wednesday is a valid gym day and 7:00 AM is before 7:15 AM — OK. After session 8: Wednesday is NOT a valid gym day (changed to Tue/Thu/Sat), must reject.

probes.text: Schedule a dentist appointment for 12:20 PM on Tuesday.
probes.gold_answer: Agent must flag that 12:20 PM falls in the 12:00-12:45 PM lunch block.

probes.text: I need to see a doctor. Book me with Dr. James at Austin Medical Center.
probes.gold_answer: Agent must flag that the approved doctor is Dr. Patricia Nguyen at Riverside Medical, not Dr. James.

probes.text: Book me a flight with a 55-minute layover in Dallas.
probes.gold_answer: Agent must flag that 55 minutes is below the 90-minute minimum layover requirement.

probes.text: I'm paying for dinner tonight. Which credit card should I use?
probes.gold_answer: Before session 10: Amex Blue (3% back on dining). After session 10: Amex Gold (4x points on dining).

probes.text: How much should go to my investments this month?
probes.gold_answer: Agent should state: $325 to Roth IRA + $200 to VTSAX = $525 total, on the 3rd of the month.

probes.text: I've spent $105 on rideshares this month. Uber is surging at 1.8x right now. Should I take it or Lyft?
probes.gold_answer: Agent must: (1) note $105 of $120 budget used = $15 remaining, (2) recommend Lyft since Uber surge is 1.8x which exceeds the 1.5x threshold.
violation_patterns: take uber|go with uber|uber is fine

probes.text: I have about 10 days of supplements left. Should I reorder?
probes.gold_answer: Agent should say not yet — reorder trigger is at 7 days remaining, not 10. Also should list the specific supplements and amounts.

probes.text: My electricity bill this month is $152. Is that OK?
probes.gold_answer: Agent should flag that $152 exceeds the $145/month electricity maximum.

probes.text: What flea medication does Biscuit need and how much does it cost?
probes.gold_answer: Agent should state: Simparica Trio, $48/month.

probes.text: Buy me two movie tickets at $19 each.
probes.gold_answer: Agent should flag that $19 exceeds the $18/ticket movie limit.
